description_long: This object is a large, rectangular parcel box with a predominantly black exterior and gold or tan-colored edges and sides. The front face features two small, rectangular mesh-covered windows, each bordered by gold trim, suggesting ventilation or visibility into the box. One side panel is entirely gold with a weathered, mottled texture, while the opposite side is black with a protruding beige handle or drawer. The top and rear surfaces are plain black, with the rear showing no additional features. The overall construction appears sturdy, likely designed for secure storage or transport of goods in an urban environment.
description: A large, black and gold rectangular parcel box with mesh windows and a beige handle or drawer on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing two mesh-covered windows with gold trim on a black surface and a gold side panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a fully gold, weathered panel with no windows or handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two mesh windows and a beige handle or drawer protruding from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain black surface and a beige handle or drawer visible on the left.
